"vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:P/PR:H/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:H/SI:H/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "When using spread syntax to render attributes from untrusted data, event handler properties are included in the rendered HTML output. If an application spreads user-controlled or external data as element attributes, an attacker can inject malicious event handlers that execute in victims' browsers. Note that this vulnerability _only_ triggers if the user's browser has JavaScript enabled but Svelte's hydration mechanism does not reach the vulnerable element before the event fires.\n\nThis is similar to but different from [CVE-2026-27121](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-27121).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00168, "percentile": 0.06413}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-pr6f-5x2q-rwfp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-14T20:19:42Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pr6f-5x2q-rwfp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-pr6f-5x2q-rwfp"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42599"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-09T17:17:07Z", "published_at": "2026-05-14T20:19:42Z", "references": ["https://github.com/sveltejs/svelte/security/advisories/GHSA-pr6f-5x2q-rwfp", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-27121", "https://github.com/sveltejs/svelte/releases/tag/svelte%405.55.7", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42599", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pr6f-5x2q-rwfp"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/sveltejs/svelte/security-advisories/GHSA-pr6f-5x2q-rwfp", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/sveltejs/svelte", "summary": "Svelte SSR vulnerable to cross-site scripting via spread attributes", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T18:41:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-pr6f-5x2q-rwfp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.55.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "svelte"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 5.55.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Svelte SSR vulnerable to cross-site scripting via spread attributes
